steps.t: The bandits who have looted Fuirion's satchel are gathered at the back of their encampment in north-west Lamedon. You should reclaim Fuirion's goods f…
The bandit who looted Fuirion's satchel is at the back of their encampment in north-west Lamedon. You should reclaim Fuirion's goods from the bandit.
